build_full: Full build (core + assets + ALL components + ALL apps)
build_slim: Slim build (core + assets + selected app + only used components)
pyinstaller_missing: PyInstaller is not installed. It is required to build .exe.
extra_deps_line1: Enter module names for PyInstaller --hidden-import, one per line.
extra_deps_line2: This may be needed by the app being built or its used components.
